title: Build Rust Polybar status engine
description: Replace Polybar's noisy xwindow module and right-side polling shell modules with one Nix-packaged Rust helper that emits sanitized Polybar markup and reduces always-running child processes.
close_reason: Implemented polybar-status Rust helper, wired Polybar to it, verified build/switch/runtime

title: Reduce idle power wakeups from Polybar and Wi-Fi
description: Investigate expensive Polybar modules, replace the top-process implementation with a cheaper approach if appropriate, and enable Wi-Fi power saving through NixOS configuration.
close_reason: Replaced polybar-topprocess with a compiled procfs sampler and enabled NetworkManager Wi-Fi power save; remaining xwindow title warning filed separately.

title: Stop Polybar xwindow title warning spam
description: Polybar still logs unmatched braille spinner characters from the xwindow module when the active terminal title contains Codex spinner text such as '⠦ dotfiles'. Investigate a minimal fix, likely replacing internal/xwindow with a sanitized title helper or adjusting title updates/font coverage.
close_reason: Replaced internal/xwindow with sanitized polybar-status title helper
